title: [MTR4] Low Effort MTR Q-Train
description: Low Effort Q-Train for MTR mod!
body:
# Low Effort MTR Q-Train
![Banner image for LERT MTR Q-Train, featuring 2 of 4 liveries available in the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e75d388f827b662c2c81f33b2ba61e4d1d97f1.png)
This resource pack adds the Q-Train for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, with it being a remodelled version of the C-Train from the base MTR mod.
## Variants
- Urban line livery
  - Normal size
  - Small size
  - Mini size
- Tung Chung Line livery
  - Normal size
  - Small size
  - Mini size
- Airport Express livery (Fictional)
  - Normal size
  - Small size
  - Mini size
- Airport Express baggage car (Fictional)
  - Normal size
  - Small size
  - Mini size
